title: Board Member
description: Serves on the governing board of the institution.

title: Director
description: Provides overall strategic direction and leadership.

title: Project Manager
description: Coordinates projects and ensures standards.

title: Principal
description: Head of the school/college responsible for overall administration and academic leadership.

title: Vice Principal
description: Assists the principal in academic and administrative functions.

title: Dean of Students
description: Manages student affairs and provides academic and career guidance to students.

title: Registrar
description: Handles student admissions, records, and course registrations.

title: HR Manager
description: Manages staff recruitment, payroll, and welfare.

title: Finance Officer
description: Oversees accounting, budgeting, and financial reporting.

title: Administrative Officer
description: Manages day-to-day school operations.

title: Admissions Officer
description: Handles student applications and enrollment processes.

title: IT Administrator
description: Maintains computer systems, networks, and software.

title: Teacher
description: Delivers lessons to students according to curriculum.

title: Lab Instructor
description: Conducts practical sessions and manages laboratory equipment.

title: Teacher Assistant
description: Supports the main teacher in classroom instruction.

title: Librarian
description: Manages the library and supports research activities.

title: Student Counselor
description: Supports students' mental health and personal development.

title: School Nurse
description: Provides basic healthcare and first aid services.

title: Welfare Officer
description: Handles student welfare and wellbeing programs.

title: Sports Coach
description: Trains and supervises sports and fitness programs.

title: Maintenance Supervisor
description: Oversees campus maintenance and repairs.

title: Technician
description: Maintains school equipment and technical systems.

title: Janitor
description: Responsible for cleaning and maintaining the school environment.

title: Security Guard
description: Ensures safety and security of staff, students, and property.

title: Driver
description: Provides transportation services for students or staff.
